title: Jamaican Sirloin Steak Kebabs
description: Grilled sirloin steak kebabs marinated in a spicy Jamaican-inspired sauce, perfect for a quick and flavorful Mexican-inspired meal.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together jerk seasoning, lime juice, and olive oil.
Thread sirloin steak into skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush both sides of the steak with the jerk marinade.
Place skewers on the grill and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches 130°F (54°C) for medium-rare.
Meanwhile, grill the onion, bell pepper, and zucchini for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
Serve the grilled kebabs with the vegetables and your favorite sides.
